= tan


Calculates the tangent of a given angle specified in radians.


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.new_value = "%f".format((this.value * (pi() / 180)).tan())

# In:  {"value":0}
# Out: {"new_value":"0.000000"}

# In:  {"value":45}
# Out: {"new_value":"1.000000"}

# In:  {"value":180}
# Out: {"new_value":"-0.000000"}
----
